unverified.label: Genuine Understanding in LLMs

all_results.label: Biological Implausibility of Backpropagation
all_results.quote: In the forward pass, you’re communicating activities of neurons to later layers of neurons. In the backward pass, you’re conveying sensitivities—a different kind of quantity altogether. This makes backpropagation rather implausible as a theory of how the brain works.
